remember: Identify different types of doping substances used in sports.
List the consequences of doping in sports.
Recall the International and national agencies responsible for anti-doping activities.
understand: Explain the reasons behind the use of doping substances in sports.
Describe the effects of doping substances on human body and performance.
Discuss the role of coaches, support staff, and medical professionals in preventing doping.
apply: Develop a strategy to prevent doping in sports at individual, institutional, and national levels.
Design an anti-doping education program for athletes, coaches, and support staff.
Evaluate the effectiveness of anti-doping measures in sports.
analyze: Analyze the reasons behind the failure of anti-doping efforts in some sports.
Critically evaluate the role of media in reporting doping cases and their impact on sports.
Compare the doping policies of different countries and international sports organizations.

ncert_objectives: To know the concept of doping and its effects on human body.
To understand the reasons behind the use of doping substances in sports.
To develop an understanding of the role of international and national agencies in preventing doping.
board_exam_objectives: To test the understanding of different types of doping substances and their effects on human body.
To assess the knowledge of reasons behind the use of doping substances in sports and the role of coaches, support staff, and medical professionals in preventing doping.
To evaluate the understanding of anti-doping measures and their effectiveness in sports.
